queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of negative checking account balances on credit default probability and their contribution to elevated credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with the absence of a checking account and their role in increasing credit risk exposure among borrowers.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into how minimal savings account balances below 100 DM correlate with reduced credit default probability and function as mitigating factors in credit risk assessment.
